query: SELECT gj.id, gj.bookId, b.title, gj.status, gj.attempts, gj.createdAt FROM generationJobs gj JOIN books b ON gj.bookId = b.id WHERE b.id IN (SELECT b.id FROM books b LEFT JOIN bookCharacters bc ON b.id = bc.bookId GROUP BY b.id HAVING COUNT(bc.id) > 1) ORDER BY gj.bookId DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user YjcbNGfyMCcwqGq.root --database cuoraNs8SGWCiJUcwSXm4W --execute SELECT gj.id, gj.bookId, b.title, gj.status, gj.attempts, gj.createdAt FROM generationJobs gj JOIN books b ON gj.bookId = b.id WHERE b.id IN (SELECT b.id FROM books b LEFT JOIN bookCharacters bc ON b.id = bc.bookId GROUP BY b.id HAVING COUNT(bc.id) > 1) ORDER BY gj.bookId DESC
